description_long: This is a classic Chesterfield-style couch upholstered in rich, dark brown leather. The couch features deep button tufting across the backrest, arms, and lower front panel, giving it a luxurious and traditional appearance. It has three large, flat seat cushions that are separate but closely fitted, and the armrests are rolled and generously padded, matching the height of the backrest. The legs are short, rounded, and made of wood, slightly elevating the couch off the ground. The leather surface has a subtle sheen, and the overall build appears robust and comfortable, suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban settings. No accent or throw pillows are visible, and the design is cohesive and symmetrical from all sides.
description: A dark brown, leather Chesterfield couch with deep button tufting, rolled arms, and three large seat cushions. The design is classic, robust, and visually luxurious.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three seat cushions, deep button-tufted backrest, and rolled armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, rolled armrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, tufted leather back and the short wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the rolled armrest and seat depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, flat seat cushions are placed side by side; the backrest is a single continuous, deeply tufted surface with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark brown leather with deep button tufting in a diamond pattern across the backrest, arms, and lower front panel.
attribute_leg_style: Short, rounded, exposed wooden legs, slightly tapered and positioned at the corners.
attribute_armrest_design: Thick, rolled armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered in tufted leather.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and attached backrest with deep button tufting, matching the armrest height and style.
